title: Metal Pipe Mace
description: A pack that makes the Mace look like a pipe and play a very loud metal pipe sound when used. Look in the versions to choose if you want a straight pipe or one with a bend!
body:
An extremely simple resource pack that turns your Mace into a metal pipe! It also adds
an extremely loud sound for when you use the mace :)

Make sure to go to the versions page to choose pipe with or without bend!
